theorem _root_.proof (S : LightProfinite) : ∀ (X : ℕ+), sorry (CategoryStruct.id X) = CategoryStruct.id (LightProfinite.FreeImage.profiniteComponent S ↑↑X) := by
  intro X
  rfl
